programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

With hard-hitting fight scenes, gritty drama and a knockout performance by Oscar winner Christopher Walken, Homeboy is an unforgettable film about a man who refuses to give up on his last chance to make good.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game

programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

But after he gets there, he discovers a conspiracy among city leaders and the conservatives in the court led by Eunuch Hai, who wants to end the Studying Abroad Campaign launched by the Westernization Movement.

programme.title: My Mother's Stalker

programme.title: Love on Retreat

programme.title: Animal 2
programme.desc: James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) took the fall for the crimes of his older son (Vicellous Shannon) and is now serving a life term at Folsom Prison. When his younger son, James Jr. (K.C. Collins), is framed for murder, Allen refuses to let two men from the same family submit to life imprisonment for crimes they didn't commit. When he learns that James Jr. was set up by someone at the prison, he resolves to win his son's freedom. To do this, he must return to his violent brawler roots.

programme.title: Shaka Zulu
programme.desc: A female captive tries to dissuade the African leader (Henry Cele) from waging war against white settlers.

programme.title: Rift
programme.desc: Sr. Special Agent Jason Cole is a man of principles and integrity. With a thriving career, a loving wife, and a reputation for hard work, he seems to have it all. But when his past resurfaces, it forces him into an impossible situation. As time runs out, he must decide: will he do the right thing, even if it costs him everything? The stakes are higher than ever imagined.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When dangerous street thug James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) is sent to prison, he continues his violent ways working for fellow inmate Kassada (Chazz Palminteri). This changes after Animal encounters Berwell (Jim Brown), a revolutionary who introduces him to the writings of Malcolm X. Animal reforms, realizing that murder and crime are destroying his community. After Animal is released, he goes home to find his son, Darius (Terrence Dashon Howard), involved in gang activity just like he was.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: The Aftermath
programme.desc: After the new guy botches a perfectly planned armored car heist, 4 crafty criminals are left trapped with the police closing in on them. Tensions rise as they try to find a way out with a hard-nosed detective hot on their trail. Will the risk be worth the reward?

programme.title: The Break of Dawn
programme.desc: After leaving an abusive relationship, college student Dawn Monae discovers that her ex has committed suicide. After some time, she meets a man named Keith online, but her roommates suspect that he isn’t who he says he is. Little do they know, he has an agenda that no one saw coming.

programme.title: The Ring Widow
programme.desc: Crystal and Sean find out that they are renting out one of their airbnb properties to a possible serial killer targeting married men that cheat on their wives.

programme.title: Repay it in Blood
programme.desc: Ten years after a robbery left their sister dead and their father broken, prosecutor Larissa and her sister Maritza, a top trauma nurse, are done waiting for justice. But just as the sisters begin targeting the crew responsible for that bloody night, the truth becomes deadlier than they anticipated.

programme.title: Bloody Bites
programme.desc: Streaming exclusively from Bloody Disgusting and Scotchworthy Productions, Bloody Bites is a compilation of snack-sized horror films that will terrorize, astonish, disturb, and excite genre fans across the globe.

programme.title: Knightriders (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The members of a traveling Renaissance Faire, who saddle up on motorcycles instead of horses, ride from town to town to stage medieval jousting tournaments with combatants in suits of armor and wielding lances, battle-axes, maces and broadswords. The spectacle of this violent pageant soon garners national attention, much to the dismay of the current king of this Camelot. A challenger to his throne arises as they try to maintain their fairytale existence in a world wrought with corruption.

programme.title: Housebound (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Kylie Bucknell, a troubled young woman, attempts to steal the safe from an ATM but the police capture her. Due to her history of recidivism, she is sentenced to house arrest for eight months under the care of her mother, Miriam. Kylie does not get along with either her mother or her stepfather, Graeme. A security contractor, Amos, explains that Kylie's ankle monitor will alert the police if she ever leaves the premises of her mother's house. Kylie is further frustrated when Miriam claims the house is haunted. Amos takes Miriam's suggestion of a haunting seriously and promises to return with ghost-hunting equipment. After a series of unexplained experiences, Kylie comes to believe there may truly be a ghost in the house. Graeme reveals that their home was once a halfway house and the site of a horrific murder. They discover evidence of the crime, including an orthodontic retainer. Amos attempts to break into her neighbor's house next but the neighbor says that he is not the killer. He tells the story of a young savant, Eugene, whom he adopted. Eugene is an expert at mechanics and electronics and disappeared a year before the killing. Kylie discovers Eugene's secret hallways in their house. She and Amos converge at the police station, and Amos corroborates her wild stories of a serial killer living in the hidden passageways. Once Dennis reveals that he wears a retainer, Kylie becomes suspicious of him. When she confronts him he attempts to kill Miriam and Kylie. Kylie and Miriam flee into the secret tunnels, where they encounter Eugene. Realizing that their paranormal activity has been Eugene all this time, they realize that he is friendly. Dennis stabs Eugene, knocks out Kylie, and begins to strangle Miriam. Eugene wakes Kylie and hands her a weapon, which she uses to stab Dennis. Eugene throws a switch, and high voltage explodes Dennis' head. Months later, all have recovered and Eugene has seemingly become an accepted member of the household.

programme.title: Road Games (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A laid-back American truck driver in south Australia starts to suspect a man driving a green van of killing young women along his route, and proceeds to play a cat-and-mouse game in order to catch him red-handed.

programme.desc: An elderly gentleman goes to the amusement park, only to find himself in the middle of a hellish nightmare.

programme.desc: A picture-perfect family is shattered when the work of a serial killer hits too close to home. Dylan McDermott stars in this chilling portrait of all-American evil.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins plays a ventriloquist whose dummy has a murderous mind of its own in this chilling psychological horror film written by legendary Hollywood scribe William Goldman.

programme.desc: Waking from surgery, Henry finds himself alone, in the dark, and in a hospital that has been overrun by a horde of flesh-hungry zombies. Together with the last few survivors, Henry must find a path to safety.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Culture" - The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. Marin (Tall in the Saddle) spins this dramatic post-Civil War tale that takes place in the legendary cow town of Abilene, Kansas, coaxing fine performances from the likes of Ann Dvorak, Edgar Buchanan, Thonda Fleming, and Lloyd Bridges. Saddle up and hang on!

Cline from a story by Zane Grey, the film stars George OBrien, Irene Hervey, and LeRoy Mason.

programme.title: Grand Canyon Trail

Plus, look for Andy Devine as Cookie Bullfincher. Film buffs should look for silent screen foil James Finlayson, a familiar face from various Keystone Cop comedies, as the local sheriff.

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Roy Rogers goes to jail after hes wrongly accused of killing Gabby Hayes horse in this action packed yarn from Republic Pictures. All of the old jokes about cowboys kissing their horse may have started with this very movie, as it focuses on Roys loving relationship with Trigger, the greatest horse in all of Hollywood. The film also features Roys beloved Dale Evans, plus, adding some country swing to the musical numbers is Roys favorite backing band, the Sons of the Pioneers! Songs include Ole Faithful, Long, Long Ago and Livin Western Style.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Challenged His Daughter Off-Road! – CHEAP Range Rovers

programme.title: Izzy Hammond has bought her first performance car!
programme.desc: Izzy Hammond has bought her first hot hatch, and she's gone big! Trading in her Mercedes A180, she has now taken the leap into the world of being a true petrolhead.

programme.title: Izzy Hammond Modifies Her £800 Range Rover!
programme.desc: Izzy Hammond combines with ORE 4x4 to upgrade her £800 Range Rover, Lizzy. Installing parts that are worth much more than the car itself, Izzy's L322 should be ready for some serious off-roading down the line.

programme.title: Richard Hammond reunites with his first bike: The Honda MTX
programme.desc: Richard Hammond reunites with his 17-year-old self in this massive nostalgia hit. Firstly listening to his old radio tapes from the 1990s, he then takes a step back even further to 1985, when he bought his first ever vehicle – a Honda MTX motorbike. Richard regales the story of his petrolhead origin, taking him back 40 years, well before the glory days of The Grand Tour and Top Gear.

programme.title: The 10-cylinder BMW that no one knows about – *W10* BMW M5!
programme.desc: Mike Fernie has searched out a truly one-of-one BMW. Used as a prototype for Volkswagen to test a W10 engine that never made it to production, this quirky E39 M5 is as weird as cars get. Mike dives into the car's engineering, as well as luckily being able to take it for a spin to understand what a W10 is all about.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Has Bought a £500 BMW 3 Series – We Investigated Why!
programme.desc: Mike Fernie and Isaac from The Smallest Cog have been given permission to rummage around the back of Richard Hammond's secret barn, digging out entire cars and numerous TV artefacts from down the years.

programme.title: I Drove A Bugatti Veyron As My Daily For 12 hours! – It Was STRESSFUL
programme.desc: Mike Fernie is thrown the keys to his childhood dream hypercar, the 253mph Bugatti Veyron. Instead of doing the obvious things like driving it down a runway or racing a plane, he uses it as a genuine daily, completing mundane tasks like a garden centre trip and a Halfords run, before taking it to some country roads to see how quick it really is.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Reveals What It Was Like Reuniting With James May at Top Gear HQ
programme.desc: Mike Fernie spices up a Q&A with Richard Hammond by challenging him to game of (Top Gear-themed) Top Trumps. Mike particularly questions Richard on his recent meet-up with former Top Gear presenter James May at Dunsfold Aerodrome, the place where the trio presented the show for 15 years.

programme.title: Can Richard Hammond Build a Car in 48 Hours
programme.desc: Richard and Izzy Hammond have one weekend to build an entire car! Starting with an exploded kit of a Caterham Academy racecar, father and daughter combine forces to build the whole car and drive it out of the workshop before the mechanics from The Smallest Cog need their garage back.

programme.title: We Found The Biggest Range Rover Graveyard In The World
programme.desc: Mike & Isaac travel into the wilds of Wales to scavenge for parts for Range Rover Club. Road-tripping in Isaac’s newly-acquired Range Rover Sport and Mike’s Rover MG ZS180, they arrive to the breaker’s yard with a shopping list of parts to help keep the three DT cheap Range Rovers on the road. But they find an astonishing array of Range Rover literally being swallowed up by the ground.

programme.title: Izzy Hammond Goes Performance Car Shopping!
programme.desc: Having daily driven a bog standard Mercedes A-Class for a few years, it's time for Izzy Hammond to upgrade. With the help of Lewis from the smallest Cog, she sets out to test the latest batch of German performance cars to see which one takes her fancy.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Drives the New BMW M5 Touring - And He's NOT a Fan
programme.desc: This is the first BMW M5 Richard Hammond has driven since our beloved V10 E61 M5 Touring, so does the 700+bhp hybrid super estate live up to the hype?

programme.title: Why are V10 engines completely gone from modern cars?
programme.desc: The V10 engine is all but gone from the car industry, but with the V8 and V12 still going strong, why has the V10 died? Mike Fernie takes the DriveTribe M5 Touring for a spin to investigate this mystery.

programme.title: Ferrari SF90 driven by Ex-Stig flat-out!
programme.desc: Believe it or not, Ben Collins – the old Stig – never got to drive a LaFerrari. So when we were thrown the keys to the brand new Ferrari SF90, we took it to Thruxton race track for the dayand handed it over to Ben. So... Does he like the electrification of the Italian brand?

programme.title: Why Isn’t There A 7-Cylinder Engine?
programme.desc: We have single cylinder engines, twins, triples, four-pots, inline fives, straight-sixes, but then we start to skip some steps. We jump to V8s, V10s and V12s, even V- or W16s. It’s a question many of you probably have never even thought to ask, but now that you’ve clicked on this video, let’s talk about it – why is there no such thing as a 7-cylinder engine?

programme.title: Cheap vs expensive SUV - Range Rover edition!
programme.desc: Izzy Hammond, Tati Reed (OverInTheRover) and Range Rover Club combine to compare Izzy's £800 L322 against a brand new £100,000 top spec Range Rover. Tackling off-road, tug-of-war and sheer popularity challenges, which mighty Range Rover will come out on top?

programme.title: Richard Hammond welcomes the legendary Toyota Supra to The Smallest Cog! Ft. @Jimmy_Broadbent
programme.desc: We invite another YouTuber to The Smallest Cog to give their car a Cog Score, and this time it is channel-favourite Jimmy Broadbent and his rather battered Mk4 Toyota Supra. It may be a legendary car, but it could be in for a hammering from Mike and Anthony!

programme.title: Richard Hammond has bought a seriously UNEXPECTED daily driver!

programme.title: Richard Hammond brings an E46 BMW M3 to the Smallest Cog! Ft. @MatArmstrongbmx
programme.desc: We all love a future classic, and it doesn't get much better than the stunning BMW E46 M3. In this new series that we're kicking off, we invited YouTuber Mat Armstrong to the Smallest Cog to have his car checked over by Mike and Anthony, and have a chat with Richard. Here's how it went!

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Recipe Testing for Tyler Huggins" - Dave’s in the kitchen, practicing dishes for this week’s guest, Tyler Huggins. His first experiment: baking a pizza inside a potato. Will it work? Will any of this work? Is there a backup plan?

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Preparing for Tyler Huggins" - This week’s guest, Tyler Huggins (founder and CEO of Meati), is on his way in to the studio. Dave’s not feeling confident, but he starts prepping for the meal anyway.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Pepperoni Loaf Pimento Grilled Cheese & Everything-Spice Flatbread: Andrew makes Christina Tosi's ultra-indulgent pepperoni loaf, then combines it with David Chang's pimento cheese to put together a crazy grilled cheese sandwich; Andrew recreates David Chang's everything-spiced flatbread—a recipe that started with Chinese bing dough, took a stop in Istanbul, and ended in a New York deli. It's flaky, buttery and delicious!

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Caesar Salad & Fettuccini Alfredo: Chris and Andrew cook two inviting recipes from the Classic Comforts menu of Dinner Time Live: Creamy fettuccine Alfredo and a Caesar salad packed with umami. These classics are a comforting and exceptional balance of heavy and light that will put you at ease.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Oyakodon & Mortadella Sandwich: Chris Ying cooks a Japanese dish called Oyakodon that he made for his buddy David Chang on a recent episode of Dinner Time Live. Oyakodon translates to “parent and child bowl” and refers to the main ingredients: chicken (the parent) and egg (the child). Chicken thighs and sliced onions are simmered in seasoned dashi, then covered in egg, which forms a custard-y blanket to be served over rice. Chris and Andrew make a Dinner Time Live recipe based on one of David Chang's favorite sandwiches in the world: a cheesy, hot, mortadella sandwich. This version has a twist—a Chinese steamed bun as a tribute to Momofuku's famous pork buns.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Pan Roasted Salmon with Caper Butter Sauce, Green Beans & Potato Rösti - Andrew prepares another delicious meal from the Classic Comforts menu of Dinner Time Live: Pan roasted, dry aged salmon with a caper butter sauce, and a buttery potato rösti, basically a fancy-sounding Swiss-German term for hash browns.

programme.title: Behind the Counter
programme.desc: Behind the Counter: Dave Chang makes Silence of the Lambs and Scream inspired dishes, and behind the scenes at Majordomo - In this episode, we give you a tour of Majordomo Studios and a behind the scenes look at Chef David Chang's creative process as he and his team come up with ideas for the Halloween episode of Dinner Time Live, a weekly live cooking show on Netflix. Dave riffs on concepts from Silence of the Lambs and Scream. The Majordomo team celebrates Halloween. Andrew makes family meal.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "A Complete Christmas Roast Beef Dinner" - The internet is full of people advertising their recipes for affordable! simple! budget-buster! Christmas dinners. But just because you want to save some money and not break your back making dinner doesn't mean you don't want something festive and celebratory. Chris Ying is here to light the way to a full Christmas dinner—roast beef, horseradish cream, creamed spinach, baked potatoes, Yorkshire pudding—for under $50. Nothing hacky or gimmick-y about it. Just a good old-fashioned heart-warming holiday dinner from Colonel Christmas himself.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "SPOOOOKY Halloween Treats!" - Chris cracks into his wife's Pinterest account to see what sort of Halloween recipes she's interested in, and is horrified by what he finds: Crescent Roll Mummy Dogs and Cheesy Halloween Breadstick Bones. We decided to throw in Witch Finger Pretzels to BOO-t. (sigh) These may not be the most culinarily advanced recipes you'll see Chris experiment with, but they are genuinely fun holiday treats that would be fun to do with your little monsters.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia is in Charleston, South Carolina where she is preparing a dinner at historic Fenwick Hall. She invites a legendary queen of Southern cooking to come by and teach her the secret to her two ingredient biscuits, learns a Nigerian inspired cocktail from a local sommelier, and heads out on the water to harvest oysters. Georgia also shares her tips for setting a southern outdoor table.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits Tuscany to get back to her own roots, and learn about the generations of families who are carrying on their family's traditions, some for centuries. She goes truffle hunting, learns to make fresh pasta, how to taste wine, and samples the incredible cheeses from the sheep grazing in front of her - experiencing the true value in living off the land.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Coffee expert Joey Chase goes on a pilgrimage along an ancient Ethiopian trading route that starts with the modern latte art cafes in Addis Ababa, then through the coffee kingdom of Jimma to the 10,000+-year-old wild coffee Yayu Forest. Village elders share the age-old secrets of hand processing, fire-pit roasting, and brewing of beans followed by a traditional feast.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: After sharing a first-ever taste of coffee in a remote Maasai village, followed by an exploration of the terrain with some new-found friends, Joey explores a grandiose coffee estate in Mt. Kenya. He then jousts with coffee buyers in Nairbobi's auction house and experiences the hand sorting and elaborate tasting of over 100 distinctive coffees in a British Tudor-style plantation cottage.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Touting the practicality of gondola travel, Joey explores the canals of Venice and discovers the oldest coffee shop in Europe. The trail to classic Italian espresso leads from Illy Coffee near the high-fashion metropolis of Trieste to the medieval town of Scarperia where espresso machines are manufactured. Florence boasts a famous barista who prepares a masterful farewell espresso.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: An exploration of Paris's distinctive cafe culture reveals a renaissance of coffee-inspired cuisine, pastries, and spirits. World-renowned "Noses" in the south of France reveal the complex contribution that fragrance and aroma make toward the perfect cup as Joey pursues the development of a coffee perfume.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Bob Marley's son Rohan takes Joey on a journey from the streets of Kingston to the peaks of the Blue Mountains. From waterfall plunges and grazing tropical fruits on Rohan's farm to roasting the smoothest coffee on earth and enjoying a Jamaican feast that ends with a Marley-hosted jam session, Joey discovers the pulse of Jamaica through the lens of Marley Coffee.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: From four-star cuisine to cappuccino on horseback, Joey explores the historic cobblestone streets and coffee estates of Antigua. A puddle jumper flight along the rims of active volcanoes leads to the age-old Mayan towns around Lake Atitlan where coffee-harvesting communities offer a glimpse of ancient traditions.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: The pursuit of the sweetest "honey" coffees on earth unleashes an adventure that includes "coffee monkeys", crocodiles, toucans, an exploration of the active crater of Volcan Poas, and surfing on the coast with a coffee farmer. The Costa Rican paradise reveals a uniquely artistic approach toward colorful honey coffees stored like wine and served just in time for a classic "coffee sock" brew.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey hits the streets of Bogota to check out the controversial trade in emeralds, the famous Juan Valdez Cafe, and some classic Colombian cuisine at an elevation of 10,000 feet. A flight to Armenia and subsequent Willy's Jeep trek uncover a remote and hidden world of quaint coffee towns and boutique farms where Joey hosts a group of international coffee buyers.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey is welcomed to Sao Paulo with a freshly brewed cup of excellence at The Coffee Lab in the trendy Madalena district. Joey checks out big coffee exporting in the Port of Santos with shipping containers stacked like legos, Jaco bird coffee (foraged from bird poop), and the world's largest savannah grassland, where Daterra Coffee Farms researches small-lot coffees on a massive scale.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Following an excursion to the extremely remote Gnobe Bugle Village, Joey Jeep-treks the terrain from the top of Volcan Baru. The search for coffee known to cost $1,000 per pound leads Joey to the eclectic town of Boquete, a plunge-worthy volcanic river-filled-crevasse, and awe-inspiring Gesha coffee farms with more rainbows and hummingbirds than one could possibly imagine.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey embarks on a journey through streets that have a 500+-year coffee history of scandal, triumph, and tragedy, from Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque and Topkapi Palace to coffee-infused nargile (hookah) and the trendy Karakoy District. Joey discovers and prepares the ultimate Turkish brew at Cup of Joy in time to catch the 13th-century coffee-inspired Whirling Dervish dancers.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: All roads in the pursuit of excellence lead to Japan. Joey discovers that specialty canned coffee from a vending machine pairs well with street food. Bullet train travel leads to a tea farm trek and tasting, coffee in a rickshaw, and Yemen mocha brewed Arab style. Joey makes coffee history in Kyoto preparing and brewing "Geisha" coffee with an authentic Japanese Geisha.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: In the wake of an expedition along the slopes of active volcanic calderas, Joey heads to Big Island Coffee where coffee, cacao, and papaya abound, sheep maintain the landscaping, and the coffee tastes like pop rocks. A Jurassic-inspired detour leads through Akaka Falls, the green turtle pools, and a vanilla bean farm. A salt-massaged coffee is celebrated with Rusty's Hawaiian Coffee Farms.

Cuban people welcome visitors with open arms, and their blend of cultures overflow with friendly and easy-going hospitality.

programme.title: The Silk Road
programme.desc: In ancient times, caravanners considered themselves safely in China only after they had first successfully negotiated the treacherous Taklamakan desert. programme.title: Summer Sunset Into Water
programme.desc: Unwind with a beautiful and picturesque New Jersey Shore sunset. Relax as the clouds and birds slowly drift across the sky and the magnificent sun lights the sky on fire.

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Seven Steps - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Counting to seven has never been more memorable and fun! Learn numbers with this simple counting song.

programme.title: Goodbye A, Goodbye Z - Super Simple ABCs and more
programme.desc: We're saying, "Goodbye" to all of our friends in Alphabet Village. As the school day ends, take a walk through town, and bid farewell to all of the letters.

programme.title: I Like To Ride My Bicycle (Mr. Monkey) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Let's go on a bike ride with Mr. Monkey and friends as we sing along to this Mr. Monkey version of the original Super Simple Song, "I Like To Ride My Bicycle." This is a great song to introduce during transportation themes! I like to ride my bicycle. I ride it every day. I ride it when I go to school. Or when I want to play.

programme.title: What's Your Name? - Kids Song - Finny the Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny the Shark is saying "Hello" and asking the question "What's your name?" This is a fun song to start the day at preschool! Hello, hello. What’s your name? Hello, hello. What’s your name? My name is Finny! My name is Myrtle! Nice to meet you.

programme.title: Wind The Bobbin Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Wind the bobbin up. Wind the bobbin up. Pull, pull, clap, clap, clap.” Get up and dance with this super fun version of the traditional English nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Oswald has a big piano concert today, but the large piano is too big for him to play by himself. What will Jett and Oswald do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: It's Christmas in Australia, Jett and Nicole decorate for Christmas, but Santa Claus and his reindeer get tired. Will Jett and Nicole deliver more presents?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Emilia, and Adash get ready for a dragon festival, but a fly distracts them. How will Jett and Emilia stop the disaster?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Max, and his grandfather have to take a giant pumpkin to the pumpkin festival, but a pumpkin rolls away. How will Jett and Max stop the huge pumpkin?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Ndapana has a package from her friend, Stig from Finland, but she knows it never snows in Namibia, until Donnie builds a giant snow globe, and Astra adds snow inside, but the giant snow globe rolls over. What will Jett, Donnie, Astra, and Ndapana do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Ivan lets Luna doggercise, but Luna gets away, after Jerome accidentally throws a ball too far away. How will Jett, Jerome, and Ivan get Luna back?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Satomi's cat Tora gets taken to the recycling center by mistake. How will Jett, Satomi and her mother get Tora back?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Nadya and her Super Wings friends are able to dance ballet, but Nadya's father needs help getting back home. Can Nadya and her Super Wings friends save the day?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Iulia's grandfather makes the mechanical robot dinosaurs come to live, but all except Rex go hay-wired, because of the rain. How will Jett, Noah, and Iulia save the day?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Nita and her father and Jett have to get all the waterproof toys outta the river, but there are too many of them, What will Jett, Nita, and her father do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Maryam and her camel Ziz are getting ready for the camel fashion show, but Ziz trips into a wheelbarrow, and runs off. How will Jett and Maryam save the day?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yi enters the race called the great wall of go, but the battery goes dead. What will Yi and his pit crew do?

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a young foal goes missing from a herd of wild horses in Patagonia, Jett and Team Dizzy help a girl named Nayla go on a search and rescue mission in the mountains to find it. A young boy named Daniel in B.C. Canada asks Jett to bring him a tool kit to help him build a treehouse for his dad. The treehouse is a success but a melting glacier causes a flood of the nearby river.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy named Maxim in Kazakhstan gets Jett to bring him a package of Kazahk doughnuts so he can give them to his mom, an astronaut who is traveling to the moon. When a toy jet gets blown off course and becomes lost in the Everglades, an impossible place to find anything, it seems like the young boy who owns it will never get it back; Jett calls Mira's Wild Team for assistance.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young girl named Tess is excited go to Schiphol Airport in her hometown of Amsterdam, where she will be going on her first airplane ride; Jett brings her a carry-on suitcase, but trouble arises when it goes missing. A mishap clogs a hot spring in Nagano, Japan, causing several new hot springs to appear; Donnie's Build-It Buddies turn the calamity into a great new water park.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A virus disrupts a computer that is needed for a webcast that a girl named Yuna in Busan, South Korea, does with her father; Jett and the Galaxy Wings go into the computer and vanquish the virus. Three Filipina sisters ask Jett to deliver mics and a stand so they can participate in a singing concert; when they are late setting out for the concert, it's a race against time to get them on stage.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett flies to Battambang, Cambodia, to deliver a duck whistle to a girl named Solyna so she can help her parents herd their ducks into a truck; when the ducks escape, Sky scrambles Paul's Police Patrol to help. Jett delivers new basketball shoes to a boy named Manu in Spain who hopes that the shoes will allow him to dunk; when the shoes don't work, Jett and the Galaxy Wings take Manu to Mars.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Little Red Car - Unlimited Songs
programme.desc: Each this animated children's rhymes compilation with colorful characters, along with catchy music.

programme.title: Ben The Train Kids Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Ben the fun kids toy train is back with more songs and rhymes like old Macdonald, Alphabet song, phonics abc song, opposites song, incy wincy spider, five little monkeys, finger family etc. This family friendly children's show promotes learning and family bonds.

programme.title: Fireplace Meditation Relaxation Sound
programme.desc: Relax with the crackling sound of a fireplace. This calming video will help you relax into a deep sleep.

programme.title: Wheels on the bus Nursery Rhyme and Kids Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the Train's nursery rhymes which children love. Learn songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Car Wash for Children - Kids Channel
programme.desc: The most popular car wash videos all in one place! This compilation features a wide number of vehicles!

programme.title: Wheels on The Firetruck + More Nursery Rhymes for Kids - Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Enjoy Boom Buddies nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, including Baby Shark, Fruits Song, and more!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails gets a megadose of Robotniks growth gas and grows quickly to monstrous proportions, eating everything in sight and accidentally terrorizing the countryside.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic loses his memory when Robotnik uses a hypnotic flower pollen on him, and tells him he's just an "ordinary" guy.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's a busy day at Lemon's salon, a charming place that is more than just a hair salon; it's one of favorite places for Strawberry and her friends to relax and socialize. All the girls are getting their hair done for the gala grand opening of Mr. Longface's new lawn-bowling and croquet club. They're spirited and laughing and chatting and having a great time, as Lemon runs from one of her friends to the next, doing hair and nails, serving tea and cookies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival. Strawberry thinks the festival will provide a wonderful opportunity to see the world through different eyes.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: It's that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom - and it looks like this is going to be a bumper crop! Strawberry decides to celebrate the event with a first-ever Berry Big Berry Blossom Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers hangs a fish mobile, then goes to see some killer whales swim and play.

programme.desc: Nancy Caterpillar turns into a butterfly. Mister Rogers visits a circus.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about learning to tie his shoes.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a short film about fish and shows his aquarium.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Joe Negri's music shop where he has a drum lesson.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Joe Negri's music shop and meets Yong Kim, a saw musician.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday announces the winner of the "Draw The Neighborhood" contest.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a cave, and King Friday removes the no-play ban.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how a player piano works, and Corney receives pretzel rocking chairs.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Folk singer Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers and sings and plays a song on a harmonica.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays a recording of grandparents and visits an aquarium.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Ben accidentally includes Kioko's prized music box from Switzerland in a cardboard box of yard sale items-the music box is sold! Kioko is sad and Ben wants to make things right, so he and Barney travel to Switzerland in search of a replacement gift. While there, they sample Swiss food, customs and games-but no music box! Luckily when Ben returns the music box is returned!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When the kids find a mysterious, colorful egg in the park, Barney takes them on a trip to Kenya to try to find out what kind of animal could have laid the egg. While in Kenya, Barney and the kids meet Ayira who introduces them to many people, cultures, and animals of the country!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ben and Rusty are looking for items for superhero costumes, when Barney comes to life, wearing a tutu. Tracy comes in and explains that she needs to find a bird of paradise for a school project. Ben, unsure, tells her they're only found in Hawaii and what they look like. Barney then takes the kids to Hawaii, using his Travel Book. In Hawaii, they learn different words, how to make leis and even a hula dance. Meanwhile, Ben and Rusty search for the bird, with a few close calls (a feather and what ended up being a coconut). During the Luau, it's revealed that the Bird of Paradise is actually a flower, not a bird. Ben, believing that it was a bird earlier, is shocked to hear that and apologizes to Rusty for getting him caught up in things. In the end, it all ends up just fine.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the Art In The Park Show, but she isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre. While there, they learn about France. And Emma learns how to paint by following her heart!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take care of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground. After a trip to the rainforest and a meeting with Mother Nature, everyone learns the importance of taking care of our world. As Earth Day comes to an end, Barney reminds us all that taking good care of our Earth is the natural thing to dofor the people we love.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop see that winter can be a wonderful time for fun. Then, when she least expects itthe snow begins to fall! Barney and his friends are decorating the caboose for Christmas when Barney decides to plan a Secret Santa game. Everyone has to buy or make a gift for the friend whose name they have drawn.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff decides to create a musical zoo when their zoo trip is postponed. Gathering instruments that sound like real animals, Riff gives Barney and his friends a zoo-mazing experience. Baby Bop enjoys her homemade boat but wants to ride in a big one. Barney shows her boats on the computer, while BJ and Riff prepare a surprise. When they return, a sailing ship awaits Baby Bop on the playset!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend, Marisa who is visiting relatives in India. Barney takes her and the other kids on a trip to the magic caboose to visit pretend countries like Egypt, Tahiti, and India. Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival. BJ and Riff share some musical art and Baby Bop shares a painting of a very special friendBarney!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide hell need their help. By the end of the day, everyone finds out that there are many fun ways to exercise. Baby Bop cant wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip so she can have Barney and the park all to herself! But, once theyre gone, she discovers that as more time that goes by, the more she misses them!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ feels left out when the kids have a Dog Show to show off their pets. BJ doesn't have a dog and wishes he did! A friend shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun. Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs. Together, they leave the eggs to look for food for when the ducklings hatch. When they return, Riff is pleasantly surprised to find the eggs have cracked open and the baby ducklings have hatched!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bops blankey seems to be getting smaller; shes convinced its shrinking. But Barney shows her that, actually, she is growing. | Baby Bop isnt satisfied with her skills. She wants to play keyboard like Riff and wants to skate like Barney.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that The Land of Mother Goose truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help! | BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty is the best policy. BJ brings his new toy plane to the park. Riff borrows it and takes it apart out of curiosity. When BJ finds out, he isn't mad and shows Riff how to put it back together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After Riff makes friends with new kid Noah, BJ becomes jealous and thinks he is not Riff's friend anymore. Barney teaches him that you can always keep your old friendships and make new ones too. When Baby Bop hesitates on keeping her promise to watch Ryan's pet frog, Barney tells her the story of The Frog Prince. And Baby Bop learns about keeping her promises.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney's friends transform the task of collecting litter pieces scattered across the park into an engaging game. Among them is Kami, the youngest of Barney's companions, who finds it challenging to keep pace with the other kids, leaving her feeling disheartened. Barney steps in and proves to each friend that their uniqueness makes them extraordinary.

programme.title: Landslide: A Portrait of President Herbert Hoover
programme.desc: Herbert Hoover was a politician and a humanitarian whose legacy has been largely defined by the Great Depression. When he was elected president in a landslide victory in 1928, Hoover had never before held public office. Even so, his humanitarian work and career as a mining engineer, businessman and U.S. Secretary of Commerce carried him to a win. When the stock market crashed on October 29, 1929, Hoovers agenda was derailed by the worsening economic crisis. Despite various efforts to pull the nation out of depression, Hoovers unsuccessful attempts led to his sound defeat by Franklin Roosevelt just four years after his landslide victory. LANDSLIDE looks at the life of the controversial figure through interviews with notable historians and Hoover scholars.The program explores the facts and fictions behind the presidency of Herbert Hoover including The Great Depression and the role of the Federal Reserve. Hoovers early life in Iowa and abroad, the international experiences that led to his decision to run for office, his presidency and political philosophy, and the lasting impacts of his policy decisions during and after the depression are revealed. Through interviews with notable scholars such as David Kennedy, Amity Shlaes, Robert Reich, Tim Egan and Timothy Walch, this biography sheds new light on Hoovers difficult tenure and enduring legacy.

programme.title: Elvis and the USS Arizona
programme.desc: ELVIS AND THE USS ARIZONA tells the surprising story of how one of music's biggest icons helped to establish a USS Arizona memorial in Pearl Harbor.In the late 1950s, the USS Arizona Memorial Commission was struggling to raise money for a permanent memorial to honor the 1,177 crewmen who lost their lives aboard the battleship on December 7, 1941. After a successful fundraising push, momentum had slowed, and though construction on the approved design was underway, only half of the necessary funds had been raised.Recently honorably discharged from the U.S. Army and headed to Hawaii to begin filming Blue Hawaii, Elvis was presented by his manager to the idea of a benefit concert to support the memorial fund. He agreed without hesitation and on March 25, 1961, performed to a sold-out crowd at the Bloch arena on the naval base. Elvis concert would draw public attention to the plight and help galvanize efforts to finish the USS Arizona Memorial as it still stands today.

programme.title: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: ABOVE AND BEYOND highlights one of the most compelling escape and survival stories from World War II that of former Rhode Island Governor Bruce Sundlun (1920-2011). Sundlun, a U.S. Army Air Corps pilot, flew a B-17 bomber nicknamed the Damn Yankee on a dozen combat missions during World War II. On December 1, 1943, Sundlun's unlucky 13th mission would take him (a Jewish-American) and his crew into Hitler's backyard the heart of Germany's industrial Ruhr Valley. While on the mission, the bomber drew heavy fire from German fighter planes and crashed in a field in the Nazi-occupied Belgian town of Jabbeke. By nightfall, Sundlun remained the only member of his 10-man crew not killed or captured by the Germans. Muddied and bloodied, Sundlun eluded the Germans by hiding in plain sight face down between a row of crops. He soon found refuge in a local farmhouse, his wounds tended by a local family. For the next several days, courageous Catholic priests and local members of the French Resistance sheltered Sundlun and provided him with fake identity papers. With help from a vast underground network, Bruce fled to occupied France, where he joined the Resistance (under the code name Salamander) and assisted them in their fight against the Nazis. Eventually smuggled into neutral Switzerland, Sundlun would spy for the U.S. Office of Strategic Services (OSS), the precursor to the CIA, tasked with communicating with French Resistance and German officers looking to surrender.The documentary unfolds as Sundlun's daughter Kara retraces his wartime journey. In Jabbeke, Kara meets author and local historian Luc Packo, as well as witnesses to her father's plane crash, who still celebrate Sundlun's contribution to their country's liberation.
